X/X/X/265.text: Ettha rāgo guṇadassanavasena mettāya sabhāgo, byāpādo tassa rāgassa visabhāgoti mettāya sabhāgassa, sabhāgena vā rāgena visabhāgatāyāti vuttaṁ siyā. Sabhāvavisabhāgatāyāti vā pāṭho bhaveyya. Evamuparipi.
